description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance convertible sports car with an aggressive aerodynamic design, featuring a low-slung body, wide stance, and prominent rear spoiler. The exterior is finished in a matte black color, giving it a stealthy and modern appearance. The car has sculpted side panels, large air intakes, and low-profile tires mounted on multi-spoke alloy wheels. The front end is sharply contoured with angular headlights and a pronounced front splitter, while the rear showcases a detailed diffuser and dual exhausts. The open-top design suggests a luxurious interior, likely with leather seats and advanced controls. This vehicle is designed for speed and style, making it a standout in any urban environment.
description: A matte black, high-performance convertible sports car with a low, wide body, aggressive styling, and a prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular hood, sharp headlights, and wide front splitter.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the low stance, sculpted doors, large air intakes, and rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detailed diffuser, dual exhausts, and the full width of the rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with similar features as view 1, emphasizing the aerodynamic lines and open-top design.
